subcodes.first_line: Peace be upon thee, O thou whose body is as a niche wherein shineth a lamp! Peace be upon thee, O thou who hast wailed and cried aloud [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: السلام علیک یا من جسمه کمشکوة فیها مصباح السلام علیک یا من ناح و ضج
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @power of the Manifestation of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
